fixes_applied: Converted invalid multiline inline shell_environment_policy.set tables to TOML subtables in profile configs.
Removed duplicate feature keys from profile configs.
Resolved invalid otel exporter scalar/table collision by using otlp_http_endpoint scalar.
Rebased config_patched.toml to retain current external_migration and mentions_v2 flags.
Rewrote hooks.json to use CODEX_HOME fallback so staging can test without base overwrite and deployment can use ~/.codex/bin/hooks.
Patched hook scripts to call live SovereignMCP tool signatures and keep stdout hook-JSON-clean.
Updated README_DEPLOYMENT.md to match actual staged files and deployment paths.
next_actions: Review staged config/hook behavior and decide whether hooks should deploy under ~/.codex/bin/hooks as staged.
Before copying out, back up current ~/.codex/config.toml and ~/.codex/hooks.json.
Copy config_patched.toml to ~/.codex/config.toml, hooks.json to ~/.codex/hooks.json, and bin/ to ~/.codex/bin only after approval.
Do not deploy /etc/codex/requirements.toml until root-level policy is explicitly approved.
